Detailed Description

Architecture-Specific Types.

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum _cinv_status_t

Indicates whether a function call succeeded or failed.

Enumerator:
CINV_ERROR  Indicates that an error occurred.
CINV_SUCCESS  Indicates that no error occurred.

enum _cinv_type_t

Represents the simple C types which can be marshaled by C/Invoke.

Enumerator:
CINV_T_CHAR  Represents the char C type.
CINV_T_SHORT  Represents the short C type.
CINV_T_INT  Represents the int C type.
CINV_T_LONG  Represents the long C type.
CINV_T_EXTRALONG  Represents the long long C type.
CINV_T_FLOAT  Represents the float C type.
CINV_T_DOUBLE  Represents the double C type.
CINV_T_PTR  Represents any pointer type.

enum _cinv_callconv_t

Indicates the calling convention being used for a function.

Enumerator:
CINV_CC_CDECL  The cdecl calling convention, the most common convention on x86.
CINV_CC_STDCALL  The stdcall calling convention, the default convention for the Windows API.
CINV_CC_FASTCALL  Yet another, rarely used, Windows calling convention.
